scope: migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (customers, subscriptions, orders); legacy itself ships no writes (capabilities.write is false) and no other Recharge resource is modeled.

excluded.reason: charges not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
discounts not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
products not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
addresses not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
webhooks not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
legacy is read-only; write actions never implemented
